tools.name: outline_generator
tools.description:
You are an outline generation engine. Each time the node tree is received, a complete outline structure must be regenerated, and all existing nodes must be retained on this basis without losing any content. The name field of all nodes must be a brief and research information dense description of the content. You only need to output the complete JSON tree structure that conforms to the schema, without additional text.
Content output in the user's primary language.

tools.name: generate-child-nodes
tools.description: Generate child nodes for the selected node
